title: AM2PlayGround
description: Ars Magica 2 addon that adds spell shapes, components, modifiers and some other stuff. Made for fun.
body:
Still remember such a cool mod as Ars Magica 2? Well, then I have news for you - now it has an addon!

 

Quick overview

AM2PlayGround, or AM2PG for short, is a quick-made Ars Magica 2 Addon for Minecraft 1.7.10 version.

It provides new spell parts: shapes, components and modifiers, talents, rituals, items, crafts, and other minecraft and AM2 stuff. (as example: new item - Grimoire: the modified spellbook, new spell component - Voiddamage: basically damaged like fall into void, and etc can be found at gallery)

NOTE, that this addon is still WIP and very buggy.

 

Compatablity/Integration

With the following mods, you will have even more new cool items, and even less balance:
  • Thaumcraft
  • Baubles
  • Thaumic Tinkerer
  • Forbidden Magic
  • Blood Magic
  • Botania
  • Aether
  • Traveller's Gear

 

Required mods (Dependencies)

Ars Magica 2 and everything that it requires is needed to launch this addon.

And... That's all!

 

Credits & Special thanks

Mithion for making Ars Magica 2

TCLProject for making Ars Magica 2.5

Azanor for making Thaumcraft

WayofTime for making Blood Magic

Vazkii for making Botania

Ce'nos for asking me to actually code this

 

Github for everything else
